office_does: A state senator writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: An incumbent senator with extensive state and county service faces a school-board member emphasizing law enforcement and fiscal restraint.

candidates.summary: Lovick is the incumbent senator and a former sheriff, county executive, state representative, councilmember, Coast Guard member, and State Patrol trooper.
highlights: Cites work opening regional peace-officer academies and building an accountability system [S1]
Supports extending light rail to Everett and beyond [S1]

spending.basis: He supports major public transit investment through completing light rail to Everett and beyond.

safety.basis: His public-safety record emphasizes officer training and an accountability system.

experience.basis: He is an incumbent senator with extensive prior state, county, city, and law-enforcement service.

candidates.summary: Larkin is a school-board member and former teacher emphasizing law enforcement, schools, affordability, and measured government results.
highlights: Supports law enforcement and stronger school preparation [S1]
Promises fiscal restraint and measured program results [S1]

spending.basis: She explicitly promises fiscal restraint and measurement of program results.

safety.basis: She prioritizes support for law enforcement.

experience.basis: She has school-board experience but no documented legislative record.
